title: ChristmasPokemon
description:
Add ChristmasThemasPokemon
There are 2 ways to get a Pokémon:
1. Pokémon spawns
2. Can be obtained via cheat
If you want to obtain it via cheat, the code is:
/pokegive username Pokémon name aspect=christmas
All Pokémon can be obtained with aspect=christmas
